pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Excluded on scope grounds: AI & ML Infrastructure (affinity 0.30) with insufficient REG signals (0). Composite moderate-to-strong (0.4237). pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 2 match(es) in AI compliance role descriptions. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working AI Lifecycle Manager.
